summary.intent: Diagnose and fix Fireworks AI provider returning 400 Bad Request errors after a schema normalization refactor around April 13, 2026.
summary.outcome: Root cause identified in json_schema_ast's canonicalization stripping 'type' from enum schemas; fixed by adding a post-canonicalization RestoreEnumTypeTransform in sanitize_schema_for_openai_compat, with 4 new unit tests. PR #740 created and review comments addressed in a follow-up commit.

repo: json_schema_ast crate (v0.3.1) performs two type-stripping transforms: lower_enum_with_type removes 'type' when all enum values match it, and lower_boolean_and_null_types converts {"type": "boolean"} to {"enum": [false, true]}.
Fireworks AI rejects schemas missing explicit 'type' annotations even when they are semantically valid JSON Schema — this is a provider-specific quirk.

The OpenAI compat pipeline applies sanitize_schema_for_openai_compat (canonicalize via json_schema_ast) then patch_schema_for_strict_mode; Fireworks goes through the strict path because needs_strict_tools() returns true for it.
Schema normalization lives in crates/providers/src/openai_compat/schema_normalization.rs; tests are in crates/providers/src/openai_compat/tests.rs.
Issue tracking and PR workflow uses 'beads' CLI tooling; PRs go to moltis-org/moltis.
In JSON Schema, 'number' subsumes 'integer', so mixed integer+float enum sets should collapse to 'number' rather than failing type inference.

code.finding: lower_enum_with_type: removes 'type' key when all enum values already match the declared type, treating it as redundant — breaks Fireworks AI.
lower_boolean_and_null_types: converts {"type": "boolean"} to {"enum": [false, true]}, stripping 'type' — also breaks Fireworks AI.
RestoreEnumTypeTransform added as a post-canonicalization schemars recursive transform: re-infers 'type' from enum values when 'type' is absent and all non-null enum values share a single JSON type.

workflow: YubiKey tap is required for git push to remote; this is a manual step that cannot be automated.
Greptile bot posts automated review comments on PRs with actionable code suggestions worth addressing.
The fix pattern for upstream crate behavior that can't be changed: apply a compensating post-processing transform rather than forking the crate.

friction: YubiKey requirement interrupted the push flow, requiring a manual retry.
The old config file became unreadable after the schema change, blocking rollback verification by the reporter.
Boolean enum test assertion needed correction because strict mode's make_nullable converts 'type: boolean' to 'type: ["boolean", "null"]' for optional fields — this was not anticipated upfront.
open_items: No e2e or integration test existed for the Fireworks provider with enum schemas before this fix — test coverage gap that may exist for other providers too.
Nullable enum anyOf branches mentioned in the bug report were acknowledged but not explicitly tested in the fix.
The json_schema_ast crate's type-stripping behavior may affect other providers beyond Fireworks; a broader audit of provider compatibility with the canonicalization pipeline was not performed.
